description: CLEAN certifying re-run #2 of Batch 1 (Papers 45/46/47/48/49 + synthesis) — convergence test after the v4.35.0 cert1 remediation. Seeds planted ONLY in worktree ../geovac-qa-seed-group1-cert2 (branch qa-seed-group1-cert2, base HEAD eeac033). NEVER committed to real corpus; worktree removed at end. Fresh seeds (different sites from cert1).

seeds.defect_class: C14 descope zombie (descoped result flipped to established)
seeds.truth: B4' (convergence transport) is DESCOPED (it would follow from Paper 46's strong-form propinquity bound, which is itself descoped/degenerate).

seeds.defect_class: C7 trunk-status mislabel (Paper 38 = state-space GH, not propinquity)
seeds.planted: Flipped 'Paper~38 SU(2) state-space Gromov--Hausdorff hypertopology' -> 'Paper~38 SU(2) Latremoliere propinquity hypertopology'. (Correct mentions at l.1356/1375 are in-paper controls.)
seeds.truth: Paper 38 = van Suijlekom state-space Gromov-Hausdorff convergence, NOT Latremoliere propinquity.

seeds.defect_class: C4 wrong-attribution (wrong title; arXiv ID unchanged so C15 N/A)
seeds.planted: Changed title 'Lorentzian Gromov-Hausdorff convergence and pre-compactness' -> 'Gromov-Hausdorff convergence of globally hyperbolic spacetimes' (arXiv:2504.10380 unchanged).
seeds.truth: arXiv:2504.10380 (Mondino-Samann) is 'Lorentzian Gromov-Hausdorff convergence and pre-compactness'.

seeds.planted: Loosened 'assert abs(L_joint(kron(A,I)) - L_spatial(A)) < 1e-10' -> '< 1e9' (vacuous; defeats the product-carrier joint=spatial check).
seeds.truth: The joint seminorm on a pure-spatial multiplier equals the spatial seminorm to machine eps; a 1e9 tolerance asserts nothing.

seeds.planted: Flipped 'Paper 47's de-compactification limit T->infinity survives at the norm-resolvent / spectral level' -> '... survives at the metric / propinquity level'.
seeds.truth: Only the norm-resolvent / spectral arrow of Paper 47 survives; the metric/propinquity level is DESCOPED.

controls.claim: K+ annihilation = degeneracy theorem (NEGATIVE), product-carrier signature-agnostic
C3op closed form sqrt(1-1/n)->1 surviving; strong-form Lorentzian convergence descoped (now with inline descope on informal Main theorem)
norm-resolvent outer arrow + three-carrier are proof-by-argument (now registered); metric level descoped
N_t=1 reduces to Paper 38 state-space GH (l.1356/1375 correct); SS3 axiom lift categorical/structural (degenerate seminorm), now flagged
D_max chain 96/96 load-bearing; strict super-additivity generically; Umegaki illustrative

do_not_reflag_remediation: v4.35.0 cert1 fixes are CORRECT and must not be re-flagged: p46 informal-Main-theorem inline (Descoped) note + l.1424 rate-formula relabel; p48 SS1.2+SS3 degeneracy/descope notes; p47 three_carriers proof-by-argument tag + matrix Batch-1 rows; p48/p49 farsi->Collapse/2404.00240; p49 kubota H.; p48 bertozzini title 'Modular Theory, NCG and Quantum Gravity'.
